notes: Validated LowHighGenerator n_log at builder/deserialization/generator boundaries; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- malformed_low_high_generator; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 range_check --lib.

QuotientGeneratorExtension uses try_inverse and returns generator failure for zero extension denominators; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- zero_denominator; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 arithmetic_extension --lib.

exp_from_bits rejects exponent vectors beyond ExponentiationGate capacity and wire helpers assert in release; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness --release -- oversized_exp_from_bits; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- exp_from_bits; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 exponentiation --lib.

CosetInterpolationGate now constrains shift * shift_inverse = 1 and InterpolationGenerator uses try_inverse for zero-shift proving errors; focused tests: cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- interpolation_generator_zero_shift; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 --test security_harness -- interpolation_generator_nonzero_shift; cargo test -p qp-plonky2 coset_interpolation --lib.
